assertions.title: Existing delivery dashboard still works

steps.expected: Dashboard renders chart and breakdowns with 2xx/4xx/5xx labels
steps.observed: Login form displayed; chart canvas exists but not visible (visibleCanvasCount=0)

steps.action: Attempt sign-in to verify live dashboard rendering
steps.expected: Successful auth and visible delivery data
steps.observed: Authentication failed. Please check your credentials.

steps.expected: No auth errors; dashboard data requests succeed
steps.observed: Console error includes 403 Forbidden; POST requests to ClickHouse endpoint observed

evidence.consoleErrors: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 403 (Forbidden) after sign-in attempt

assertions.issues: Blocked on ClickHouse authentication for live dashboard verification within mission constraints (no secret-file access; known rotated david_query credentials can produce 403).

assertions.title: Existing lambda dashboard still works

steps.expected: Lambda Logs dashboard renders title and chart with data
steps.observed: Page title shows Lambda Logs but login form is displayed and chart not visible (visibleCanvasCount=0)

steps.action: Attempt sign-in to verify live lambda rendering
steps.expected: Successful auth and visible lambda chart with custom aggregations
steps.observed: Authentication failed. Please check your credentials.

steps.expected: No auth errors; lambda data requests succeed
steps.observed: Console error includes 403 Forbidden; POST requests to ClickHouse endpoint observed

evidence.consoleErrors: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 403 (Forbidden) after sign-in attempt

assertions.issues: Blocked on ClickHouse authentication for live lambda verification within mission constraints (no secret-file access; known rotated david_query credentials can produce 403).

frictions.description: Regression assertions require authenticated ClickHouse access, but mission constraints disallow reading secret files for credentials.
frictions.resolution: Used non-secret verification attempts and captured login/auth-failure evidence.

blockers.description: Unable to authenticate to ClickHouse-backed dashboards for live data verification; console showed 403 Forbidden on ClickHouse requests after sign-in attempts.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried page navigation and performed sign-in attempts from both dashboard.html and lambda.html; both remained at login with authentication failure.

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 0 passed, 0 failed, 2 blocked due ClickHouse authentication constraints/403 during live dashboard verification.
